title: MyCodexVantaOS Naming Exception Record
description: Schema for each exception entry in governance/exceptions.yaml. Based on naming-spec-v1.md 15.1.

id.description: 9.8, 15.1 — Unique exception id in timestamped-id format: exception--<YYYYMMDD>--<random6>

rule.description: 15.1 — The naming rule-id being deviated from.

scope.description: 15.1 — Affected resource scope (e.g. a specific service-id, directory, or pattern).

reason.description: 15.1 — Technical justification for the deviation. Must be substantive.

approver.description: 15.1 — Architecture committee member id who approved this exception.

expiresAt.description: 15.1, 15.2 — ISO 8601 date. Exceptions MUST NOT be indefinite.

status.description: 15.1 — Current status of this exception record.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date when this exception was first registered.

mitigationPlan.description: Optional: description of the migration plan to eventually comply with the rule.
